title: romulea lutea
intro: Romulea lutea, also known as the yellow harpy's beard or yellow romulea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Romulea lutea is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional South African medicine to treat various ailments.
